topic: Cell A cobot C262/C263 encoder index mark

messages.text: cobot faulted with C263 about an index mark not detected entering running
C263 is joint encoder commutation - the motor encoder didn't find its index reference when entering RUNNING. usually needs a re-home / re-init of that joint
the fault detail names it. move that joint slowly off any hard stop, then re-initialize/home from the pendant. clear the stop per SOP-2201 after it indexes
re-homed, the joint indexed, fault cleared
